headline: CNBC Daily Open: China sets lowest growth target in decades
summary: That target at 4.5% to 5% marks a downgrade from the “around 5%” set in the past three years.

headline: Nvidia Leads Chip Stock Rebound, Billionaire Investor Buys 1 Million Shares To Defy AI 'Bubble' Fears
summary: Semiconductor stocks like Nvidia (NVDA) and AMD are bouncing back Wednesday. Discover why billionaire Leo KoGuan is doubling down on AI with a massive share purchase and why experts say the recent sell-off was a "nervous market" overreaction.

headline: Schneider Electric Links AI Data Center Growth With Sustainability Focus
summary: Schneider Electric, SK Telecom and Supermicro agreed to work together on modular AI data center solutions, targeting more scalable and efficient AI computing infrastructure. Schneider Electric also received an award recognizing its leadership in sustainable procurement practices. For investors watching ENXTPA:SU, these moves add fresh context around a share price of €253.55 and a 3 year return of 72.9% and a 5 year return of 122.6%. The company is already well known for its role in energy...

headline: Netlist Q4 Earnings Call Highlights
summary: Netlist (OTCMKTS:NLST) executives said the company made progress in 2025 on both its memory-product business and its intellectual property enforcement efforts, while benefiting from a sharp rise in memory pricing driven by AI-related demand and a global shortage of chips. headline: SK Telecom, Supermicro and Schneider Electric Sign MOU on Total Solutions for AI Data Center Deployment
summary: SK Telecom (NYSE: SKM) announced it has signed a three-party memorandum of understanding (MOU) with global server manufacturer Supermicro and global mechanical, electrical and plumbing (MEP) leader Schneider Electric to develop a total solution for artificial intelligence data centers (AIDC).
